recent_projects.name: seculint
recent_projects.summary: It is a lightweight local secret and privacy leak scanner and can be used by developers, devops engineers and cybersecurity teams. It scans source code, configh files and project directories for hard coded credentials, API keys, OAuth Tokes, JWTs and bearer tokens, database connection strings, provate keys and certificates, personal data (emails, phone numbers, Ids)
recent_projects.author: Shahid Riaz Bhatti

recent_no_vcs_projects.name: seculint
recent_no_vcs_projects.summary: It is a lightweight local secret and privacy leak scanner and can be used by developers, devops engineers and cybersecurity teams. It scans source code, configh files and project directories for hard coded credentials, API keys, OAuth Tokes, JWTs and bearer tokens, database connection strings, provate keys and certificates, personal data (emails, phone numbers, Ids)
